prompt: Premium supplement advertisement for social media, clean professional layout, 1:1 square format. OVERALL BACKGROUND: pure light warm gray (#EDEFF3), perfectly flat and uniform, NO shapes, NO frames, NO boxes anywhere. TOP LEFT ZONE (left 48%, top 3%-16%): small bold dark gray text 'Disponible en:' (#444444, 12px sans-serif), immediately below it the word 'Immunotec' in blue (#1A5FA8, 20px bold sans-serif). TOP RIGHT ZONE (right 52%, top 3%-18%): large rounded pill/banner shape filled with deep blue (#1255A0), inside the pill bold white uppercase text 'IMMUNOCAL PLATINUM' (30px, tight letter-spacing, centered). LEFT COLUMN (left 50%, 18%-100%): COMPLETELY EMPTY — only the flat light gray background (#EDEFF3), no shapes, no frames, no white boxes, no elements whatsoever, just flat gray. RIGHT COLUMN (right 50%, 20%-95%): thin horizontal light gray divider line (#CACDD6, 1px) directly below top banner. Below divider, bold uppercase text 'BENEFICIOS:' in deep blue (#1255A0, 28px, tight tracking). Then three benefit rows, each row: circular filled blue icon (#1255A0) with white checkmark, followed by dark charcoal body text (#252525, 15px): Row 1 'Alivia el dolor crónico desde la raíz.' Row 2 'Reduce inflamación articular y muscular.' Row 3 'Regenera y fortalece tus articulaciones.' 22px gap between rows. Below the three rows, a thin 1px horizontal separator line (#CACDD6). Below separator, italic text in medium blue (#1A5FA8, 13px) reading 'Respaldado con más de 40 años de investigación científica'. BOTTOM RIGHT CORNER: small 'Immunotec' wordmark text in blue (#1255A0, 11px bold). Vertical gray divider line (#CACDD6, 1px) running from y=18% to y=95% at x=50% separating columns. Clean, modern, pharmaceutical-grade design.
negative_prompt: white rectangle, white box, white frame, product placeholder, gray box, rounded box in product area, any shape in left column, product images, bottles, boxes, packaging in the generated image, dark background, extra logos, watermarks, clutter, red tones, ornate decorations, shadows on background, texture, noise, gradients other than described, blurry text, comic style, illustration style
